member.name: M:K2Warmup.Workflows.Helpers.Selectors.CssSelectorToUiPathSelector(System.String)
member.summary: Translates a CSS selector string into a UiPath web selector string.
member.param: The CSS selector, e.g. "body > div.L3eUgb > h1"
member.returns: A UiPath-compatible selector string, e.g. "<webctrl css-selector='body>div.L3eUgb>h1' />"

member.name: M:K2Warmup.WorkflowRunnerService.GetAssets(System.Boolean)
member.param: Indicates whether to isolate executions (run them within a different process)

member.name: M:K2Warmup.WorkflowRunnerService.Main(System.Boolean)
member.param: Indicates whether to isolate executions (run them within a different process)

member.name: M:K2Warmup.WorkflowRunnerService.WarmupPage(System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.param: Indicates whether to isolate executions (run them within a different process)

member.name: M:K2Warmup.WorkflowRunnerService.WarmupPageShell(K2Warmup.Workflows.Parsing.Models.PageConfig,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.param: Indicates whether to isolate executions (run them within a different process)
